name: EPG Enricher
description: Enriches EPG programme data with TMDB artwork (posters, backdrops), genres and descriptions. Only processes channels that are mapped in your playlists, complementing existing Schedules Direct / Gracenote metadata where data is missing.

settings.label: TMDB Configuration
settings.description: TMDB API source settings and general behavior.

fields.label: Enrich programmes with TMDB data
fields.helper_text: Fetch posters, backdrops, genres and descriptions from TMDB for programmes that are missing artwork.

fields.label: TMDB search language
fields.helper_text: Language for TMDB searches (e.g. 'de-DE', 'en-US', 'fr-FR'). Leave empty to use the global TMDB language from general settings.

fields.label: Overwrite existing metadata
fields.helper_text: Replace existing artwork and descriptions even if the programme already has data (e.g. from Schedules Direct).

settings.label: Enrichment Options
settings.description: Choose which metadata fields to enrich from TMDB.

fields.label: Enrich missing categories/genres
fields.helper_text: Fill in missing genre/category from TMDB when the programme has none.

fields.label: Enrich missing descriptions
fields.helper_text: Fill in missing programme descriptions from TMDB.

fields.label: Use episode-level details for TV series
fields.helper_text: For episodic TV programmes with season/episode data, use TMDB episode overview and screenshots when available.

fields.label: Enrich poster/icon artwork
fields.helper_text: Fetch poster images from TMDB and set them as the programme icon.

fields.label: Enrich backdrop images
fields.helper_text: Fetch backdrop (landscape) images from TMDB and add them to the programme images array.

settings.label: Genre & Detection
settings.description: Genre mapping and keyword-based category detection.

fields.label: Map genres to Emby compatible EPG categories
fields.helper_text: Normalize TMDB genres to the compact category names used by Emby-style guide coloring: Movie, Series, News, Sports, Kids, Documentary, Music, Education.

fields.label: Map genres to Kodi guide color genres
fields.helper_text: Use the detailed Kodi genre labels from m3u-editor issue 347, such as Basketball, Public Affairs, Comedy-Drama, Science Fiction, Cooking, and Game Show. When enabled, this takes precedence over the compact Emby compatible category option.

fields.label: Detect categories from title keywords
fields.helper_text: Detect Sports, News, Kids, and Documentary categories directly from programme titles. Active when either the Emby compatible or Kodi guide genre mapper is enabled.

settings.label: Automation
settings.description: Automatic enrichment triggers and playlist scope.

fields.label: Auto-run after EPG cache generation
fields.helper_text: Automatically enrich EPG data whenever the cache is rebuilt.

fields.label: Limit auto-run to these playlists
fields.helper_text: When a related EPG cache is generated, fully enrich all EPG sources used by these playlists. Leave empty to include all related playlists.
